marshallese.build_an_equivalent_ratio_family: Kalōk juon baaṃle in ratio ko rej joñan wōt juon
marshallese.equivalent_ratio_table_for: Tebōḷ in ratio ko rej joñan wōt juon ñan
marshallese.top_line_value_per_interval: Value in lain eo ilōñ ñan interval kajjojo
marshallese.bottom_line_value_per_interval: Value in lain eo ilaḷ ñan interval kajjojo
marshallese.n_1_top_unit_corresponds_to: 1 unit in lain eo ilōñ ej jerbal ippān
marshallese.the_top_line_increases_by: Lain eo ilōñ ej laḷḷọk kōn
marshallese.per_interval_and_the_bottom_line_incre: ñan interval kajjojo im lain eo ilaḷ ej laḷḷọk kōn
marshallese.enter_an_amount_greater_than_zero_for_: Likūt juon joñan eḷap jān zero ñan option ko ruo.
marshallese.both_options_have_the_same_cost_per_un: Option ko ruo ewōr aer cost per unit eo wōt juon.
marshallese.option_a_has_the_lower_cost_per_unit: Option A ewōr an cost per unit ediklaḷḷọk.
marshallese.option_b_has_the_lower_cost_per_unit: Option B ewōr an cost per unit ediklaḷḷọk.
marshallese.adjust_the_values_so_both_unit_rates_s: Kōkāāl value ko bwe unit rates ko ruo ren pād ilo learning-model range.
marshallese.rate_outside_model_range: Rate ej pād ilikin model range
marshallese.a_fair_comparison_divides_each_cost_by: Juon keidi ejiṃwe ej ajej cost kajjojo kōn quantity eo an make. Context emaroñ bar kōṃṃan kōn kar eṃṃan, jorrāān, ak aikuj ko jet.
marshallese.this_example_is_above_the_1000_learnin: Waanjoñak in ej lōñḷọk jān joñan 1000% in learning model. Kōkāāl part ak whole.
marshallese.this_result_is_above_the_1_000_000_qua: Tōprak in ej lōñḷọk jān joñan quantity 1,000,000. Kōkāāl value ko in waanjoñak.
marshallese.the_percent_is_not_defined_when_the_wh: Percent ejjab kaalikkar ñe whole ej zero. Likūt juon whole eṃṃan ñan kalōk tep eo.
marshallese.the_whole_is_not_defined_when_the_perc: Whole ejjab kaalikkar ñe percent ej zero. Likūt juon percent eṃṃan ñan kalōk tep eo.
marshallese.ten_equal_sections_each_represent_10_o: Joñoul mōttan rej joñan wōt juon, kajjojo ej kwaḷọk 10% in juon whole.
marshallese.learning_model_range_0_to_1000_quantit: Learning-model range: 0% ñan 1000%; quantity ko ñan 1,000,000.
marshallese.each_outlined_section_is_exactly_10_of: Mōttan kajjojo eo ewōr lain ipeḷaakin ej jiṃwe 10% in juon whole. Mōttan eo eobrak jimattan ej kwaḷọk fraction eo ejiṃwe in 10% eo.
marshallese.enter_at_least_two_valid_coordinate_pa: Likūt ijoḷọk ruo pair in coordinate rejiṃwe, ekoba juon eo value in x ejjab zero.
marshallese.proportional_the_unit_rate_is_constant: Proportional: unit rate eo ejjab oktak.
marshallese.not_proportional_the_evidence_does_not: Ejjab proportional: kaṃool ko rejjab kwaḷọk juon unit rate eo ejjab oktak im ej deblọk origin.
marshallese.x_values_comma_separated: Value ko in x (kōjepel kōn comma)
marshallese.x_values_comma_separated_2: Value ko in x, kōjepel kōn comma
marshallese.y_values_comma_separated: Value ko in y (kōjepel kōn comma)
marshallese.y_values_comma_separated_2: Value ko in y, kōjepel kōn comma
marshallese.use_the_same_number_of_x_and_y_values_: Kōjerbal oran eo wōt juon in value ko in x im y. Graph in quadrant kein kajuon ej aikuj juon nōṃba ejjab dik jān zero ilo row kajjojo.
marshallese.fix_the_coordinate_list_before_making_: Kōkāāl list in coordinate ṃokta jān aṃ kōṃṃan pepe kōn proportionality:
marshallese.table_and_unit_rate_evidence: Kaṃool jān tebōḷ im unit rate
marshallese.no_valid_paired_rows_yet: Ejjañin wōr row ko rejiṃwe im ewōr pair.
marshallese.a_proportional_model_ray_is_extended_t: Juon proportional model ray eṃōj kaetoke deblọk origin.
marshallese.no_complete_set_of_points_is_available: Ejjeḷọk set eo eobrak in point ñan graph.
marshallese.table_evidence_all_defined_y_x_values_: Kaṃool in tebōḷ: aolep value ko in y ÷ x eṃōj kaalikkari rej joñan wōt
marshallese.the_entered_points_include_0_0_and_fol: point ko eṃōj likūti rej koba (0,0) im rej ḷoore ray in model.
marshallese.the_model_ray_extends_the_constant_rel: ray in model ej kaetoke kōtaan eo ejjab oktak deblọk (0,0), meñe ejjab likūt origin.
marshallese.check_for_changing_y_x_values_a_nonzer: Etale ñe ewōr value ko in y ÷ x rej oktak, juon value in y ejjab zero ñe x = 0, ak point ko rejjab pād ioon juon lain ejiṃwe eo ej deblọk origin.
marshallese.enter_an_answer_before_checking: Likūt juon uwaak ṃokta jān etale.
marshallese.back_to_stem_tools: Rọọl ñan kein jerbal ko in STEM
marshallese.move_between_representations_and_expla: Eṃṃakūt ikōtaan representation ko im kōmeḷeḷeik kōtaan in kōḷap.
marshallese.best_for_fair_comparisons_because_ever: Eṃṃan tata ñan keidi ejiṃwe kōnke jabdewōt wāween eṃōj jeje ippānḷọk ñan juon unit.
marshallese.a_ratio_measured_against_a_whole_of_10: Juon ratio eṃōj joñe ṇae whole in 100; kōjerbal part = percent × whole.
marshallese.a_straight_line_through_the_origin_sho: Juon lain ejiṃwe eo ej deblọk origin ej kwaḷọk juon multiplier ejjab oktak jān x ñan y.
marshallese.estimate_first_preserve_units_and_ask_: Bwini ṃokta, kōjparok units, im kajjitōk ñe quantity ko ruo raar oktak ilo wāween in kōḷap.
